# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Direct URL to the build artifact (S3 presigned URL, Artifactory URL, HTTP/HTTPS URL, etc.)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: 'artifact.tar.gz', description: 'Local filename to save the downloaded artifact as')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_HOSTS', defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com,prod2.example.com', description: 'Comma-separated list of production hosts to deploy to')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'SSH user for deployment')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases', description: 'Remote directory where the artifact should be placed')
        string(name: 'REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service name to restart after deployment')
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart the service after deploying the artifact')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloaded"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_HOSTS?.trim()) {
                        error('DEPLOY_HOSTS is required')
                    }
                    sh "mkdir -p '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                dir("${DOWNLOAD_DIR}") {
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        echo "Downloading artifact from: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 -o '${params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        ls -lh '${params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def hosts = params.DEPLOY_HOSTS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    if (hosts.isEmpty()) {
                        error('No valid deployment hosts provided')
                    }

                    hosts.each { host ->
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            echo "Deploying to ${host}"
                            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}' 'mkdir -p "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"'
                            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/'
                        """

                        if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                echo "Restarting service ${params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME} on ${host}"
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}' 'sudo systemctl restart "${params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME}"'
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed"
        }
        always {
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, notFailBuild: true)
        }
    }
}
